result.reasoning: From the tool call history, step 2 extracted 10 stops: Alpha, Beta, Delta, Gamma, Epsilon, Sigma, Tau, Pi, Chi, Omega. Step 3 computed distances between adjacent stops using haversine formula and found the shortest distance to be between Chi and Omega (5.297 km). Step 4 confirmed the shortest distance pair is Chi, Omega. The stop names are given with capital first letters as per the data, so the authoritative casing is "Chi" and "Omega". Applied casing rule: authoritative casing from source data.
